Background: A wandering adventurer traveling Tyris. Known for her gunslinging abilities and her pechant for gambling. Her family were forced out of Nithraa due to a military uprising, fleeing to Tyris to where her grandmother Kari lived. Growing up in an unfamilliar land, Evie had her kind-hearted grandmother and her fierce mother as teachers, resulting in her becoming a capable fighter at an early age with a heart of gold. Enjoys adventures, fishing, and eating the fish she catches.
